elements.description: Faint, mirror-image reverse bleed-through of typed text from the other side of the page. Multiple blue ink stamps are visible, including 'RECEIVED' stamps from the 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'F.B.I.', 'INTER-OFFICE CORRESPONDENCE', and dates such as 'OCT 20 53 PM '52' and 'OCT 28'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions a photograph of a saucer-type object, while Description B describes only text bleed-through and stamps with no mention of a photograph, indicating a fundamental contradiction about the visual content.
